summary: Multi-Value Filter Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed covering multi-value filtering for summary, by-month, and top endpoints. Frontend: All 9 MultiSelect components present with checkbox UI, tags display, search functionality, and clear filters working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Multi-value tienda filter (BOOSH,GR238) returns filtered data in /summary
Backend: Multi-value marca filter (BOOSH,REDDOOR) returns filtered data in /summary
Backend: Single value tienda filter continues to work correctly
Backend: 'Sin tienda' mixed with real values (BOOSH,Sin tienda) works
Backend: Multi-value tienda filter works in /by-month endpoint
Backend: Multi-value marca filter works in /by-month endpoint
Backend: Multi-value tienda filter works in /top endpoint
Backend: Multi-value marca filter works in /top endpoint
Backend: Multi-value tipo filter works in /top endpoint
Backend: Combined multi-filters (tienda+marca) work together
Backend: Three stores filter (BOOSH,GR238,GM209) works
Frontend: All 9 MultiSelect components present (Tienda, Vendedor, Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Hilo, Talla, Color)
Frontend: Tienda dropdown opens with checkboxes (not simple dropdown)
Frontend: Multiple values selectable simultaneously (BOOSH + GR238)
Frontend: Tags display selected values with X buttons
Frontend: Search input present in dropdown for filtering options
Frontend: KPIs update when multi-filter applied (22,902 → 4,879 with BOOSH+GR238)
Frontend: 'Limpiar filtros' button appears when filters are active
Frontend: Individual tag removal works (X button removes single value)
Frontend: Clear all filters restores original unfiltered values
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _build_filters() function correctly handles comma-separated multi-values using ANY() operator
Backend handles 'Sin tienda'/'Sin asignar' special values mixed with real values
Frontend MultiSelect component uses Popover+Command+checkboxes pattern correctly
Frontend filter state uses arrays (e.g., tienda: ['BOOSH', 'GR238']) serialized as comma-separated for API
Frontend Badge component shows selected values with individual X buttons for removal
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data via materialized view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-value filtering feature fully implemented and tested. All 9 filter dropdowns (Tienda, Vendedor, Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Hilo, Talla, Color) now support multi-selection with checkboxes. Backend uses comma-separated values with ANY() operator. Frontend uses MultiSelect component from multi-select.jsx. Filter state uses arrays serialized as comma-separated strings for API calls.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Multi-value filter feature implemented correctly.
